arts.ttl: Relief club remedied mistake of selling player to Middlesbrough – Now an absolute star for them
arts.sum: Marten de Roon has been a constant figure in Atalanta’s starting lineup since returning to the club from Middlesbrough in 2017. Gian Piero Gasperini took charge of the Serie A club in June 2016 and in his first transfer window, he sanctioned the midfielder’s sale to Boro. Middlesbrough then secured a promotion to the Premier The post Relief club remedied mistake of selling player to Middlesbrough – Now an absolute star for them appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick now needing a leaf out of Aitor Karanka's book for Middlesbrough play-off hopes
arts.sum: Michael Carrick’s team went close to matching them last season when Boro won five, drew four and lost just one game in the run-in, for a tally of 19 points. This suggests that Boro may need to match Karanka’s best finish of 22 points if they are to achieve the top six spot which we all believed was a near given at the start of this campaign.

arts.sum: Middlesbrough and Ipswich Town scouts were among those watching Wycombe Wanderers’ Richard Kone in action last weekend, as… The post Middlesbrough, Ipswich Town among clubs eyeing Wycombe Wanderers star appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough academy use warning during injury crisis with 'faith' point made
arts.sum: However, in a bit of a transitional period, they have many players out on loan, while their next batch of youngsters are still very young and perhaps not yet ready for first-team exposure, particularly in such a high-pressure scenario. Michael Carrick has not ruled out using academy players to ease Middlesbrough ’s defensive injury crisis, but warns it can’t just be a case of throwing any youngster in.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's bullish response to Middlesbrough January transfer decision question
arts.sum: Michael Carrick delivered a bullish defence of his decision not to sign another centre-back in the January transfer window, with Middlesbrough now facing a defensive injury crisis. But asked about the decision not to sign a centre-back in January beyond making Edmundson’s loan signing a permanent one, Carrick said: “You can only have so many players in your squad.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough FC Set to End Kit Deal with Errea
arts.sum: Middlesbrough Football Club has officially announced that they will part ways with Italian sportswear manufacturer Errea at the conclusion of the 2024-25 season, ending their second partnership with the brand.

arts.ttl: Dael Fry, Rav van den Berg, Josh Dede and more - Boro injury update ahead of QPR
arts.sum: Fry was Boro ’s last remaining fit centre-back after injuries suffered by George Edmundson, Rav van den Berg and Luke Ayling. It’s a blow for Boro who now face two important games this week against QPR and Luton Town with no fit centre-backs.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick offers update on free agent’s Middlesbrough training stint amid defensive crisis
arts.sum: Middlesbrough appear unlikely to sign Erik Pieters amid Michael Carrick’s latest update on the free agent defender. Middlesbrough… The post Michael Carrick offers update on free agent’s Middlesbrough training stint amid defensive crisis appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough appear to have made a decision on free-agent defender after trial last week
arts.sum: Boro now have two games this week before an international break, but they are likely to play both without a recognised senior centre-back against QPR and Luton, with Pieters not back at Rockliffe on Monday and therefore unlikely to be signed. Middlesbrough appear unlikely to pursue a deal to sign free-agent defender Erik Pieters after his trial at the club last week.
